title: ஸகளாதிகாரம் பாகம் 1
content:
# ஸகளாதிகாரம் பாகம் 1

Creator: s rajasekhar
Date: 2025-08-08T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 40
Subjects: Tamil sculpture, Sirpam, South Indian art, temple architecture, Indian iconography

Sakaladhikaram Sirpam – Part 1" is a classical Tamil text that explores the ancient art and science of Sirpam (sculpture) as practiced in South Indian temple architecture. This volume delves into traditional techniques, iconographic principles, proportions, tools, and spiritual significance behind temple sculpture. A valuable resource for scholars of Indian art, architecture, Tamil literature, and heritage conservation.
